# Plugins, Adapters, And Projections

Use this discussion for early design tradeoffs around how CtxVault should
connect to source and target surfaces without weakening the receipt model.

- projection targets such as Cursor rules or portable agent trees;
- source connectors for Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, or shell traces;
- MCP usage patterns;
- future local-model analyzer plugins;
- plugin manifest and receipt expectations.

When a request becomes concrete and scoped, move it to an Integration Request
issue.
